channel.title: Jobs on Pivot
channel.description: Recent content in Jobs on Pivot

item.description:
Today’s Jobs

  • Tech Lead — API Platform | Areti Group — Areti Group is a Series A climate tech B Corp building an API platform for climate data and emissions tracking; the role involves leading a team that designs and scales REST APIs in Go and PHP with Vue.js frontends, which maps directly to production ML/MLOps experience building and maintaining high-throughput API infrastructure.

  • Staff Software Engineer | Arcadia — Arcadia builds energy management and carbon tracking software that helps organizations monitor and reduce energy consumption and emissions; the remote Staff Engineer role likely involves scaling their data platform and analytics stack, making it a strong fit for someone comfortable building and operating production data pipelines and model-serving infrastructure.

Today’s Jobs

  • Principal AI Systems Engineer — Titan Advanced Energy Solutions — Titan builds AI-driven energy systems for grid and industrial optimization. The role centers on production-grade AI infrastructure and agent-based systems, which maps directly to someone who’s shipped ML pipelines at scale.

  • Senior Software Engineer — Station A — Station A builds an energy procurement and optimization platform that uses ML to help companies source and manage clean energy. The remote role involves backend systems that process energy market data in production, a solid fit for engineers with MLOps and high-throughput service experience.

Today’s Jobs

  • Senior Backend Engineer — Octopus Energy Group — Octopus Energy builds a proprietary energy retail platform (Kraken) that manages smart meter data, dynamic tariff optimization, and grid balancing for millions of customers. A senior backend role here would involve production-scale systems handling real-time energy data pipelines.

  • Senior Full-Stack Engineer (Global | Remote | English) — Open Energy Transition — Open Energy Transition develops open-source energy system modeling tools used by grid operators and policy researchers to simulate decarbonization pathways. This is a fully remote senior full-stack role working on the software infrastructure behind energy transition modeling.

Today’s Jobs

Senior Full Stack Software Engineer — Electric Air — Electric Air builds electric heat pump systems and the software to manage them. US-based with possible remote eligibility. Strong match for a senior engineer comfortable owning full-stack systems in a hardware-adjacent climate startup.

Machine Learning Engineer — Gridmatic — Gridmatic develops ML-driven trading and optimization software for wholesale electricity markets. This is a core ML engineering role where production experience building and shipping models translates directly.

Today’s Jobs

  • Staff Machine Learning Engineer - Wildfire — Overstory — Overstory builds satellite-based wildfire detection and environmental monitoring systems using computer vision. This role requires production ML engineering skills to deploy and maintain real-time wildfire prediction models at scale.

  • Staff Machine Learning Engineer - Wildfire — Overstory — Overstory builds satellite-based wildfire detection and environmental monitoring systems using computer vision. This role requires production ML engineering skills to deploy and maintain real-time wildfire prediction models at scale.
